sefirot.name: כֶּתֶר
sefirot.body: Divine will, the pre-conscious source. Beyond intellect.

sefirot.name: חָכְמָה
sefirot.body: Flash of insight; the primal point from which all unfolds.

sefirot.name: בִּינָה
sefirot.body: Womb of differentiation; reasoned grasp of the seed-idea.

sefirot.name: חֶסֶד
sefirot.body: Outflowing mercy; the 72 Names; right arm of the Tree.

sefirot.name: גְּבוּרָה
sefirot.body: Restraint and boundary; the fire that defines form.

sefirot.name: תִּפְאֶרֶת
sefirot.body: Harmonized center; the heart of the Tree; the Son.

sefirot.name: נֶצַח
sefirot.body: Enduring drive; the prophetic right leg.

sefirot.name: הוֹד
sefirot.body: Acknowledgment and surrender; the left leg.

sefirot.name: יְסוֹד
sefirot.body: Channel of union; the covenant; the righteous one (Tzadik).

sefirot.name: מַלְכוּת
sefirot.body: Indwelling presence (Shechinah); the receiving vessel of creation.

13.concept: Echad (אחד) — One; also Ahavah (אהבה) — Love. Unity and love share the same value.

15.concept: Yah (יה) — the short Name; also Hod.

17.concept: Tov (טוב) — Good. 'And God saw that it was good.'

26.concept: YHWH (יהוה) — the Tetragrammaton itself sums to 26.

32.concept: Lev (לב) — Heart; also the 32 paths of wisdom (Sefer Yetzirah).

72.concept: Chesed — Loving-kindness; the 72 Names of God (Shem HaMephorash, Ex 14:19–21).

86.concept: Elohim (אלהים) — God as judgment/creation; also HaTeva (הטבע) — Nature.

112.concept: YHWH + Elohim (26 + 86) — Mercy joined to judgment.

148.concept: Netzach — Eternity / Victory; also Pesach (פסח) — Passover.

153.concept: The fish in John 21:11; the 17th triangular number; early fathers read it as a symbol of the Church.

216.concept: Gevurah — Severity; also Aryeh (אריה) — Lion; 6³ = the 72 Names × 3 letters.

248.concept: Abraham (אברהם); the 248 positive commandments; the limbs of the human body.

358.concept: Mashiach (משיח) — Messiah; also Nachash (נחש) — Serpent. The redeemer answers the seducer at the same value.

365.concept: The 365 negative commandments; the days of the solar year.

496.concept: Malkhut — Kingdom; the tenth Sefirah; also Leviathan (לויתן).

611.concept: Torah (תורה) — the totality of teaching, given through Moses.

613.concept: Total mitzvot (248 + 365); also Moshe Rabbeinu (משה רבנו).

620.concept: Keter — Crown; also the 620 letters of the Ten Commandments (Rabbenu Bachya).

666.concept: The number of the beast (Rev 13:18); also Solomon's annual tribute (1 Kgs 10:14).

888.concept: Iēsous (Ἰησοῦς) — Jesus in Greek isopsephy. Answers 666.

1081.concept: Tiferet — Beauty; the heart of the Tree.

tzimtzum.name: Tzimtzum
tzimtzum.meaning: Divine contraction — God 'withdrew' to make space for finite creation.

shevirat-hakelim.name: Shevirat HaKelim
shevirat-hakelim.meaning: The shattering of the vessels — sparks of holiness scattered into creation, awaiting reunion.

tikkun.name: Tikkun
tikkun.meaning: Mending / repair — the human task of gathering sparks back to their source.

gilgul.name: Gilgul
gilgul.meaning: Soul-rotation / reincarnation — souls cycle through bodies until tikkun completes.

merkavah.name: Ma'aseh Merkavah
merkavah.meaning: Work of the Chariot — esoteric interpretation of Ezekiel's vision.

bereshit.name: Ma'aseh Bereshit
bereshit.meaning: Work of Creation — esoteric interpretation of Genesis 1.

ein-sof.name: Ein Sof
ein-sof.meaning: The Infinite — God beyond all attributes, before any Sefirot.

shechinah.name: Shechinah
shechinah.meaning: Indwelling Presence — feminine aspect of divinity, associated with Malkhut.
